speaker: MATT
raw_text: Uk'otoa, once a creation of Zehir, the Cloaked Serpent god, now banished since the Calamity. This entity then began to build its own following, and the followers of Zehir, this old god, this once creator grew jealous and sealed it away. Now, Avantika, with your help, is working to begin to release these seals, bring it back, and as such, gain the blessings and boons of this entity. You decided to go into the jungle with her on this mission alongside an adventurer, a dungeoneer who had plotted out some of the path for you, named Jamedi. You had made your way through, avoiding hunting parties of lizard men being hunted by yuan-ti snake people. You made your way towards a mostly stone-crafted village in the center of this island that surrounded one large old temple. You snuck in, masquerading as some of these snake people and mostly succeeded, managed to sneak your way through part of the town, gathering some attention. You threw up some distracting illusions. You quickly killed off a few of them that had begun to grow wise to your presence, not being naturally wanted, and in the midst of the commotion, you raced up the steps of the temple, managed to kick one of the sentries off the side, found a way through the top, and closed it off, locking behind the very top of this five-sided pyramid. Now, once inside, you began to descend slowly down the curved stairs, but in missing a trap that was present, triggered it. The stairs went smooth, and the entire party slid down this slide, Goonies-style before impacting into the ground of one of the top chambers of the pyramid. Looking within the interior of this five-sided chamber, you noticed amongst the two pillars to the side a raised platform where there was a fountain of some kind surrounded by three of these mostly humanoid, but snake-scale-covered-in-places yuan-ti people and one with gray, armored, scaly skin, mostly human body though tall and lanky, and a head that was purely cobra-like. The hood exposed as all of them turn to your direction as you impact with the stone, and are made aware of your presence. With that, Mighty Nein, I would like for you to roll initiative. (exclamations)

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Do you know all the rules and stuff?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (laughs) You can check that out next Thursday, October 25th at this time, 7:00pm Pacific, in place of Critical Role on Geek & Sundry's Twitch, YouTube, and Alpha channels. I think that's the extent of our announcements for tonight. That brings us into the next episode of Critical Role!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yaas, yuan-ti! [TV static, click] [groovy Critical Role theme]

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Welcome back everybody. Last we left off, The Mighty Nein had found their way south outside of the Empire on the coast of the Menagerie Coast, stolen a pirate ship, apparently. Following a thread to pursue aspects of the mystery of Fjord's background and the relationship to his mysterious patron, followed a mostly charred map to an island known as Urukaxl. Passing the dangerous reefs, you came upon the mother ship to the ship that you had stolen, known as the Squalleater, which was then, you realized, helmed by Captain Avantika, who gave you the option of either working with her under her guise as, essentially, currently captives and maybe eventually crewmen of the ship, or be killed and left in the harbor, held down with rocks and die. You took her up on the offer. You also discovered that she seems to be as enthralled with this same entity as Fjord is and has some sort of similar history with how this serpentine entity known as--

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Look at you! Did you roll initiative for Yasha?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Do I get any jump on that Slow spell I tossed out at the last second of the episode? Yeah, I said "I start casting Slow," and you said, "That's where we'll pick up next week."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yes, you will, and that'll be your turn, because literally-- it's not so much a stand-- you just slid down and hit the ground, and you just take a moment to take in the scenario and then now we get to be--

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Deep in the single digits over here.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Hey Max, can I get Ashley's iPad?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: 21 points of damage in one round. (impacts) The bolt hits. Immediately, the creature (growls). The eyes flash open and looks around, sees the illusion, looks in the direction where the bolt came from and glances up and sees you at the top of the stairway. Everyone roll initiative. (cheering)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, both attack with advantage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Melee spell attacks. It's an ambush. It doesn't know you're there.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Wait-- oh, she attacks with advantage.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay, wait, got to look at my spell.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay, that's good.16 plus seven is--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm think I shoot at disadvantage because I'm longer than 30 feet away.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Can I bonus action? No, this is a single sneak attack action.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Does the dupe count as an ally, though?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No, it does not. It has to occupy space for it to be an ally.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Do I get advantage on the attack if I'm hidden?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Right! So it should just be a single attack.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I like it! I know, yeah, I'm into it!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: The first one I rolled was a 12 plus eight is 20.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That would hit, so roll damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Because it is an ambush you get advantage on that.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Oh, it was a critical hit?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Well, isn't it because it's a sneak attack?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's okay. You're thinking of a critical hit.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's all good. No worries. So the total is?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 38 points of damage. That is not bad at all.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I rolled-- let's see here, sorry. I rolled a 15 and I will use-- because we short rested?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'll also use Fury of the Small again. So that's 21.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Because you already used your reaction to do so. In which case, actually, it's going to slither even further up into getting with melee with Jester as well. Now the heads are curling down inside and it's making its way to up into the hallway. That ends the hydra's turn. Beau, I need you to roll a death saving throw, please.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: All right, thank you. Ugh, ten.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Hard to read. The hydra, now that it has, technically, advantage with the abomination across from you, Beau, it's going to take its attack--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That means it's a straight attack for you.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'll do the sentry on it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: No, I got bracers and I'm just fast as fuck.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That hits. Roll damage for Yasha.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Ooh! That is 14 points of piercing damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: With the Bane brought it down to 21. I rolled a three. It was a 24. He's rolling really good this round.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That is 14 points of piercing damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Goddamn it. I'm out of healing.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That finishes the hydra's turn. The hydra now regrows.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, and she's all by herself over there.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: You're with Jester's clone, but you're between them.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I don't have any fire in the bag of holding, either.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It is back up to five heads now. It's looking really rough, though. With Beau down, it's going to slither up over here and get into melee with you, Caduceus.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: No attack of opportunity because of sentry, right?
